alert: Cache latency is elevated and evictions increased sharply.
root_cause: cache memory limit is too low

evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:cache: Cache metrics show memory pressure and elevated latency.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:cache:MAX_MEMORY_MB: Cache MAX_MEMORY_MB is configured too low.

logs: WARN eviction pressure high namespace=products evicted=8400

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(cache memory limit is too low, increase cache memory limit)
